title: KitLib
description: Modular in-game toolkit for StS2 — cheats, AI host, save tools, and extensible modules for players and mod authors.
changeNote:
[b] v0.21.0 [/b]

[b]— — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — EN — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — —[/b]

[b][ Changed ][/b]

[b]•[/b] [b]STS2 v0.107.1[/b] — KitLib requires the current game build ([b]v0.107.1[/b]). Older versions (including [b]0.103.3[/b]) are not supported.

[b][ Fixed ][/b]

[b]•[/b] [b]Mod Feedback[/b] — The log file dropdown now lists session logs from other game instances (instances/<pid>/session.log), not only the current window.
[b]•[/b] [b]Multiplayer[/b] — KitLib no longer breaks joining or hosting on the current game version.

[b][ Removed ][/b]

[b]•[/b] [b]Automatic crash feedback prompts[/b] — KitLib no longer detects unhandled errors or abnormal exits and opens a feedback dialog. Use [b]Dev Mode → Diagnostics → Mod Feedback[/b] (or the in-run dev rail) to export a report manually.
[b]•[/b] [b]kitlib.compat.toml sidecar[/b] — KitLib no longer reads or shows version/dependency warnings from compat sidecars in Mod settings or on the main menu. Declare requirements in the game's official mod manifest (min[i]game[/i]version, dependencies) instead.

[b]— — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — 中文 — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — —[/b]

[b][ 变更 ][/b]

[b]•[/b] [b]STS2 v0.107.1[/b] — KitLib 需要当前游戏版本（[b]v0.107.1[/b]），不再支持更旧版本（含 [b]0.103.3[/b]）。

[b][ 修复 ][/b]

[b]•[/b] [b]Mod 反馈[/b] — 日志下拉列表现可看到其他游戏实例的 session 日志（instances/<pid>/session.log），不仅限当前窗口。
[b]•[/b] [b]联机[/b] — 在当前游戏版本下加载 KitLib 不再导致无法正常加入或主持联机。

[b][ 移除 ][/b]

[b]•[/b] [b]自动崩溃反馈提示[/b] — KitLib 不再检测未捕获异常或异常退出并弹出反馈对话框。请通过 [b]开发者模式 → 诊断 → Mod 反馈[/b]（或局内 dev 侧栏）手动导出报告。
[b]•[/b] [b]kitlib.compat.toml sidecar[/b] — KitLib 不再读取 compat sidecar，也不在 Mod 设置或主菜单显示版本/依赖警告。请在游戏官方 mod 清单（min[i]game[/i]version、dependencies）中声明依赖。
